title: potentilla canescens var. leopoliensis
intro: Potentilla canescens var. leopoliensis, also known as Silver Buffaloberry, is a shrub native to North America, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Silver Buffaloberry include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Potentilla canescens var. leopoliensis often involve infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically to support skin health and internally to support digestive well-being.
